docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,999.00 FILED BY STILSON, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT WHITESIDE, KICHA WOODS-GLAUDE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WHITESIDE, KICHA WOODS-GLAUDE
PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SENT PAPERS TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-17-2002, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-24-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STILSON, STEVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITESIDE, KICHA WOODS-GLAUDE $4,799.00 PRINCIPAL, $57.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,856.50, PAYMENT TO BE MADE IN INSTALLMENTS OF $25.00 ON THE 1ST AND 15TH. PAYMENTS TO START AT 2/1/02 - NO PAYMENT TO BE LATER THAT 10 DAYS. IN THE EVENT OF A DEFAULT ON PAYMENT, THE ENTIRE AMOUNT BECOMES DUE. PAYMENTS TO BE MADE TO PLTF'S ACCOUNT THROUGH AUTOMATIC DEDUCTIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
